svg.aria-label: A macOS desktop showing a Light-theme Spec Editor on the left and an overlapping Dark-theme AI Terminal on the right summarizing technical review comments.
svg.title: Engineering Spec Review with AI Co-Pilot
svg.desc: A premium, high-fidelity design engineering illustration of a collaborative spec review workflow. The left window is a white document editor with active comments and inline edits; the right window is a dark terminal showing an AI agent summarizing the unresolved engineering decisions.

g.text: Incremental writes must be robust against intermittent network

are not strictly enforced across the client-
